content.title: YC Directory
content.short_description: Startup pitch platform with Sanity CMS and GitHub OAuth.
content.description: YC Directory is a modern web platform that enables entrepreneurs to submit startup pitches, connect with fellow founders, and gain visibility through virtual competitions. The application provides a searchable directory of startup ideas where users can browse, filter by category, and view detailed pitch information. It features user authentication via GitHub, content management through Sanity CMS, and a responsive interface built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS.
content.role: I developed a full-stack startup directory platform with Next.js 15, implementing server-side rendering, authentication flows, and real-time content management. I created the core components including startup cards, search functionality, and detailed pitch views. I integrated Sanity CMS for content management, set up GitHub OAuth authentication with NextAuth, and designed a modern UI using Tailwind CSS with custom utility classes. The project includes proper TypeScript typing, responsive design, and optimized performance features.

achievements: Created a scalable startup directory platform with real-time content updates
Implemented efficient search and filtering functionality for startup discovery
Established proper authentication and user management system
Built responsive design optimized for various screen sizes
Integrated headless CMS for easy content management by non-technical users
technologies: Next.js 15 with App Router and Server Components
Sanity CMS for content management and headless CMS integration
TypeScript for type safety and development experience
Tailwind CSS for modern, responsive styling
React Server Components and Client Components architecture

screenshots: Main homepage showing startup directory with search functionality
Individual startup pitch detail page with author information
